zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Godbold於大約1493年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可丹寧頓時，她的父親Thomas Godbold44歲，母親Margery Storye39歲。她於1515年與William Crispe在英國英格蘭素福爾可拉可費爾德結婚。他們至少是5個女兒的父母。她去世於1553年3月17日之前在英國素福爾可拉可費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Godbold于大约1493年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可丹寧頓时，她的父亲Thomas Godbold44岁，母亲Margery Storye39岁。她于1515年与William Crispe在英国英格兰素福爾可拉可費爾德结婚。他们至少是5个女儿的父母。她去世于1553年3月17日之前在英国素福爾可拉可費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Godbold
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Suffolk): from the Middle English and Old French personal name Godebald, Godbaud, a medieval French form of the ancient Germanic name Godebald, composed of the elements gōd ‘good’ or god ‘god’ + bald ‘bold, brave’.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Godbold was born about 1493, in Dennington, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Godbold, was 44 and her mother, Margery Storye, was 39. She married William Crispe in 1515, in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 daughters. She died before 17 March 1553, in Laxfield, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Godbold est née environ 1493, à Dennington, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Godbold, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Margery Storye, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé William Crispe en 1515, à Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 filles. Elle est décédée avant 17 mars 1553, à Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Godbold um 1493 in Dennington, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Godbold 44 und ihre Mutter Margery Storye 39. Sie hat 1515 in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom William Crispe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Töchter. Sie starb vor 17. März 1553 in Laxfield, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Godbold è nata il circa 1493 nel Dennington, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Godbold, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Margery Storye, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato William Crispe nel 1515, nel Laxfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figlie. Morì prima del 17 marzo 1553, nel Laxfield, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Godboldが約1493年にイギリスイギリススフォルクデニントンで生まれた時，父Thomas Godboldは44歳，母Margery Storyeは39歳であった。1515年にイギリスイギリススフォルクラクスフィールドでWilliam Crispeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1553年3月17日以前にイギリススフォルクラクスフィールドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Godbold(이)가 대략 1493년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 데닝턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Godbold(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Storye(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1515년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 라스필드에서 William Crispe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1553년 3월 17일 이전 영국 수폴크 라스필드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Godbold nasceu aproximadamente 1493, em Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Godbold, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Margery Storye, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com William Crispe em 1515, em Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 17 de março de 1553, em Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Godbold родилась около 1493 г. в местности деннингтон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Godbold было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Storye, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Crispe в 1515 г. в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 дочерей. Она умерла перед 17 марта 1553 г. в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Godbold nació aproximadamente 1493, en Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Godbold, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Margery Storye, tenía 39 años. Se casó con William Crispe en 1515, en Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijas. Murió antes de 17 de marzo de 1553, en Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
